candidates.name: Freshworks
candidates.sourceDetail: Found on Built In, SoftwareSuggest, TechJockey SaaS lists. Also in companies.json but has NO app entries.
candidates.reason: NASDAQ-listed Indian SaaS unicorn from Chennai. Freshdesk, Freshsales, Freshservice serve 50K+ companies globally. Already in companies.json but missing app entries. 3 sources.
candidates.skipReason: Swadeshi Meter score 20 — Delaware incorporated, US HQ, founder stepped down. Not suitable as swadeshi app.

candidates.name: Postman
candidates.sourceDetail: GSC: 'postman founder' 34 impressions. Found on Indian SaaS directories. Cross-ref: only alt for Insomnia.
candidates.reason: Bangalore-founded API platform, $5.6B unicorn, used by 98% of Fortune 500. GSC demand + 3 discovery sources. We list Hoppscotch as its alternative but don't list Postman itself.
candidates.skipReason: US incorporated (Delaware), HQ San Francisco. Similar to Freshworks — Indian-founded but not swadeshi enough.

candidates.name: Physics Wallah
candidates.sourceDetail: Found in Built In EdTech, LeadSquared Top 20, RiseUpp Top 100 EdTech lists.
candidates.reason: India's first affordable edtech unicorn ($2.8B), 10M+ downloads, IPO Nov 2025. Fills education category gap (currently only 4 apps). 2 sources.

candidates.name: Unacademy
candidates.sourceDetail: Found in Built In, Decentro Top 22 EdTech, competitor directories.
candidates.reason: Major edtech unicorn ($3.44B), raised $860M. India's largest platform for UPSC, JEE, NEET. Fills education gap. 2 sources.

candidates.name: OYO Rooms
candidates.sourceDetail: Found in Failory Indian Unicorns ($9B), Decentro Best Travel Apps 2026.
candidates.reason: India's most valuable travel unicorn ($9B). 43K+ properties, 1M+ rooms in 80 countries. Fills travel gap (currently only 3 apps). 2 sources.

candidates.name: ixigo
candidates.sourceDetail: Found in Decentro Top 15 Travel, GrowthX, Paggu Top 10 OTA lists.
candidates.reason: IPO'd AI-powered travel platform. 48Cr+ annual users. Strong in tier-2/3 markets. Fills travel gap. 2 sources.

candidates.name: Zerodha
candidates.sourceDetail: Found in SG Analytics, FinTech Review Top 10, KnowStartup Unicorns.
candidates.reason: India's largest stock broker, bootstrapped unicorn. Zero-brokerage model. Profitable. Massive user base.

candidates.name: Groww
candidates.sourceDetail: Found in SG Analytics, FinTech Review Top 10 Indian Fintechs.
candidates.reason: Unicorn investment platform. Mutual funds, stocks, ETFs, US stocks. Targeting first-time investors.

candidates.name: CRED
candidates.sourceDetail: Found in SG Analytics Best Fintech 2026, Cashfree Top Fintech list.
candidates.reason: Unicorn fintech for credit card bill payments and rewards. Premium user base. Expanded to loans and credit scores.

candidates.name: Dream11
candidates.sourceDetail: Found in Failory Indian Unicorns ($8B), Tracxn, StartupBlink.
candidates.reason: India's biggest fantasy sports platform ($8B). IPL title sponsor. Massive mainstream user base.

candidates.name: Zomato
candidates.sourceDetail: GSC: 'zomato ownership' 38 impressions. Major Indian food delivery platform.
candidates.reason: India's leading food delivery platform. Public company. GSC demand for ownership info. 2 sources.

candidates.name: Cashfree Payments
candidates.sourceDetail: Found as Indian Stripe alternative. Y Combinator backed.
candidates.reason: Processes $80B annually for 800K+ businesses. First Indian fintech with 140+ currencies. Stripe alternative. 2 sources.

candidates.name: Vedantu
candidates.sourceDetail: Found in Built In, Decentro EdTech lists. Live tutoring platform.
candidates.reason: Leading live online tutoring, raised $289M. IIT alumni founded. K-12 and competitive exam prep. Fills education gap. 2 sources.

candidates.name: upGrad
candidates.sourceDetail: Found in Decentro, Business Standard edtech lists.
candidates.reason: India's biggest online higher education. Programs in data science, ML, management. 3M+ learners across 100+ countries. 2 sources.

candidates.name: Pabbly Connect
candidates.sourceDetail: Found as Indian Zapier alternative. Cross-ref: Zapier has only 1 Indian alt (Zoho Flow).
candidates.reason: Indian no-code workflow automation with lifetime pricing. 2000+ app integrations. Fills Zapier alternative gap. 14K+ businesses.

candidates.name: Flock
candidates.sourceDetail: Found as Indian Slack alternative. By Bhavin Turakhia (Directi).
candidates.reason: Indian team messaging from Mumbai. 35K+ companies. Channels, video, screen sharing, built-in tools.

candidates.name: DooGraphics
candidates.sourceDetail: Found as Indian Canva alternative. Shark Tank India S3 funded.
candidates.reason: India's Canva alternative from Pune. 94K+ businesses. 20K+ templates. Hindi/regional language support. Shark Tank funded. Fills creative gap.

candidates.name: InVideo
candidates.sourceDetail: Found in TrueFan AI video tools, TechJockey alternatives list.
candidates.reason: Indian AI video creation platform. 4K+ templates, 9M+ premium media. Text-to-video and voiceovers. Fills creative gap.

candidates.name: MilesWeb
candidates.sourceDetail: Found in TechRadar, SoftwareTestingHelp Top 10 Hosting India.
candidates.reason: Highest-rated Indian hosting company. Shared, VPS, dedicated, cloud. Data centers in India, USA, Canada, Singapore. Fills hosting gap.

candidates.name: Chargebee
candidates.sourceDetail: Found on Built In, SoftwareSuggest Indian SaaS lists.
candidates.reason: Chennai-founded subscription billing unicorn ($3.5B). Automates revenue ops for 4500+ subscription businesses.
